steps.title: Write equations from the given information
steps.content: The ribbon is cut into two parts with lengths $x$ and $y$ that sum to 61 inches: $$x + y = 61$$ We're told $x$ is 10 more than 2 times $y$: $$x = 2y + 10$$

steps.title: Substitute to solve the system
steps.content: Substitute $x = 2y + 10$ into the first equation: $$(2y + 10) + y = 61$$ Combine like terms: $$3y + 10 = 61$$ Subtract 10: $$3y = 51$$ Divide by 3: $$y = 17$$ Now solve for $x$: $$x = 2(17) + 10 = 44$$
